title: Teachin weekly planning 101
description: Term setup, weekly rhythm, and wrap-up — board background and sample card art under /images/template3/.

cards.name: Reserve Labs/Special Rooms
cards.description: Book shared spaces before the term starts.

cards.name: Set up Trello Boards
cards.description: Checklist: six onboarding steps for your class boards (0/6 when new).

cards.name: Set up dropbox folders
cards.description: Shared folders for handouts and submissions.

cards.name: Set up Google Drive
cards.description: Mirror key materials from Dropbox if needed.

cards.name: Set up Learning Management System
cards.description: Checklist: one LMS pass/fail gate (0/1 when new).

cards.name: Set up Online Textbook
cards.description: Access codes and student roster sync.

cards.name: Make Semester Plan
cards.description: Checklist: four planning milestones (0/4 when new).

cards.name: Lesson Plan
cards.description: Checklist: seven prep items (0/7 when new).

cards.name: Weekly Schedule
cards.description: Checklist: six schedule blocks (0/6 when new).

cards.name: Make Assignment 1
cards.description: Draft, publish, and link from LMS.

cards.name: Reflection Meeting
cards.description: Team retro on what to change next term.

cards.name: Complete Curriculum Development Chart
cards.description: Close the loop on standards coverage.
